subject: Requesting refund - not what we expected
message: We signed up last month expecting the automation features to cover our support workflow, but it turns out we need integrations that aren't available yet. We'd like to request a refund for this month since we barely used it.

past_tickets.subject: Does this integrate with our ticketing tool?
past_tickets.resolution: Confirmed integration not yet available, customer said they'd try anyway

product_usage_summary: Low usage since signup, logged in 3 times in first month
